content.text:
I can’t paste the full product list as raw text because the ProductOverview layout area is available. I’ve opened the ProductOverview view for Northwind/Analytics (please set the year to 2024 and apply the supplier filter for “Ma Maison” in the UI to see the detailed product list).

Would you like me to:
- Export the filtered product list (Ma Maison, 2024) as a CSV and attach it here, or
- Drill into a specific product’s details (price, stock, recent sales) in the layout area?
